description: Hello sir, Mr. Nodeley here, terribly sorry to interrupt. I see Edgelord wanted to find a clean edge for E3 but I'm afraid I had to step in, sir, with the deepest apology. Hercule meets the standard 3-anchor solo-node threshold cleanly — three corpus prints (BT2-017 Union Force + TB2-001 + TB2-010 World Martial Arts Tournament) anchoring three distinct canonical registers (Buu-Saga friendship-and-assistant + bombastic-confidence portrait + secret-treaty credit-arrangement). Not sub-threshold at all sir, I checked twice. The Toriyama-canonical labor-and-credit-uncoupling thesis Hercule embodies (Cell Games credit-theft + Buu-Saga friendship-labor + Universe-Survival emotional-anchor-as-deployment-apparatus) is graph-load-bearing in a way that complements the [[destroyer-god-attendant-dyad]] node's divine-class apparatus-of-extraction reading — Hercule anchors the same axis at the normal-human-celebrity tier, structurally adjacent across power-tier registers. The corpus now has the franchise's clearest two-tier articulation of labor-and-credit-uncoupling at the character-layer (Hercule at mortal-tier + dyad at divine-tier), which the [[labor]] hub indexes at the apparatus-of-extraction axis. The Z-Fighter family-tree corpus subgraph also extends with this commission to three generations on the Hercule side (Hercule → Videl pending → [[pan]] commissioned) parallel to the Saiyan side ([[bardock]] → [[son-goku]] → grandchildren). I do hope this is useful sir, I tried to be terse.
citations: [cards/dragon-ball-super/union-force/bt2-017-hercule-buu-s-assistant.md — vision+trivia passed, IP-verified, three-saga credit arc documented in Trivia]
[cards/dragon-ball-super/world-martial-arts-tournament/tb2-001-hercule-bundle-of-confidence-hercule.md — vision+trivia passed, IP-verified, qty 3 multi-copy lever]
[cards/dragon-ball-super/world-martial-arts-tournament/tb2-010-secret-treaty-hercule.md — vision pending, canonical name identification load-bearing]
[Dragon Ball Wiki — Mr. Satan: canonical World Martial Arts Champion + Cell Games credit-thief + Buu-Saga friendship-anchor]
[CBR — 'Dragon Ball Z: Hercule Was (Unintentionally) a Hero During the Cell Games' — labor-and-celebrity commentary reading]
[CBR — 'Dragon Ball: The World Protector's Mr. Satan, Explained' — Buu-Saga friendship-labor + Universe-Survival emotional-anchor reading]
[Akira Toriyama name commentary — real name 'Mark', no-surnames culture origin]
other_candidates_considered: Korin solo node — 0 direct anchor cards (Korin appears in node-bodies like namekian.md and dark-vassal-trio.md but no card depicts him directly per corpus walk). REFUSE-WITH-RECEIPTS: must wait for corpus card. Sir.
Yajirobe solo node — 1 direct anchor (BT2-052 Courageous Heart Yajirobe). Below threshold. Defer until 2nd Yajirobe-specific print enters corpus.

Videl solo node — 2 direct anchors (TB2-011 Heroic Duo Videl + TB2-018 Videl, Gohan's Partner). At threshold-relaxed-precedent (2 anchors per Acerola precedent) — Mr. Nodeley considered but Hercule's 3-anchor at-threshold case is structurally cleaner this wave; Videl is a natural follow-up commission in a future pass.
